oidcRPMetaDataOptionsStepUpClaims.documentation: RFC 9470 — emit `acr` and `auth_time` claims in this RP's JWT access tokens, so a Resource Server can decide whether to issue a step-up authentication challenge

oidcRPMetaDataOptionsStepUpClaims.en: Emit step-up claims (acr, auth_time) in access token
oidcRPMetaDataOptionsStepUpClaims.fr: Émettre les claims step-up (acr, auth_time) dans l'access token
